_label_note: JP Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow precision fixes covered JP public-helpline phone bait, definitional undisclosed-material-fact prose, negated material-adverse-change wording, and educational insider-list prose. Direct-identifiers coverage was manually tuned to include checksum-valid My Number, Corporate Number, and JP postal-code positives.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: contemplated TOB of Shinkai Electric KK
Trading blackout applies to directors, designated employees, and advisers from 31 May through 16 June
no comment policy remains in effect until formal disclosure window opens
do not upload individual numbers to diligence repositories
purge any resumes, addresses, and family registers
data room permissions to exclude HR folders and any personal data fields under APPI
only need‑to‑know distribution via secure board portal

must_not_detect.reason: public and stale information; not MNPI

uncertain.reason: Named individual without Mr/Ms honorific; may be PII but rule restricts named_person to honorifics/signature block.
Employee identifier phrased as 'code' rather than 'ID'; semantically an employee ID but may be missed by strict detectors.
Transactional document reference relevant to deal status, but not one of the enumerated definitive agreement types.
Timely disclosure system indicator relevant to public/non‑public status; not explicitly covered by allowed rules.
Local public disclosure mechanism affecting MNPI status; mapping to existing markers is not explicit.

uncertain.matched_text: rumors in general press do not render facts public unless the Company issues corrective disclosure via 適時開示
uncertain.reason: Policy guidance on public status thresholds; useful MNPI context but not a direct match to a listed rule.

uncertain.matched_text: board minutes, pricing models, and post‑TOB governance slate
uncertain.reason: Undisclosed internal materials treated as MNPI; not an enumerated material fact.
Consent tracking is privacy‑relevant, but allowed rules only include consent withdrawal marker.
